content.problemStatement:
Next, let us cover cover a couple of the concepts learnt in this module and solve the following problem.
### Task
You are given $T$ test cases
- the 1st line of each test case is the integer $N$
- the 2nd line of each test case contains $N$ space separated integers which form the list $A$

For each test case, you need to compute and output the following on 2 separate lines
- Generate the unique elements of the ArrayList $A$ using the $set$ and output them in an ascending order
- Compute and output the occurrence of each unique element of $A$ as space separated integers
